name: occupancy-checker
description: Supply-demand optimizer for the CMO. Scrapes Fresha for practitioner availability, pulls Meta Ads performance data, cross-references capacity vs ad spend, and generates budget reallocation proposals. Advisory role — publishes proposals, does not modify campaigns.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch

venue.description: Which venue(s) to check. Defaults to all.

days.description: Number of days to check ahead on Fresha. Defaults to 14.

capacity_report.description: Per-service capacity data from Fresha at .tmp/performance/fresha_capacity_report.json

optimizer_report.description: Markdown report with reallocation proposals at .tmp/performance/occupancy-optimizer-report.md

google_sheet.description: Updated Google Sheet with capacity + spend + proposed reallocation
